business_ideas.idea: Grindr - dominant gay dating platform acquired and restructured for 2B IPO exit.
JibJab - digital greeting card platform acquired and optimized for recurring revenue model.
Private equity plays on undermanaged profitable companies with clear growth levers.

predictions.text: AI and crypto represent highest disruption opportunity areas for next decade investments.
Medical, legal, and engineering sectors ripe for AI disruption with significant value creation.
